eligibility: A local government scheme that provides full electricity cost support to farmers using electric-powered irrigation systems to reduce irrigation expenses and promote agricultural productivity.
benefits: 100% of electricity charges incurred from irrigation usage are paid by the municipality.
application_process: Visit the Agriculture Section of Sunbarshi Municipality Office
Fill out the irrigation electricity subsidy application form
Allow inspection of irrigation meter and pump system
usage_conditions: The subsidy applies only to electricity consumed through irrigation electric lines. Electricity used through domestic or household meters is not eligible.
